All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

F

FlowAnnotator - Class in org.plugin.refactor.code
AST visitor responsible for annotating control-flow rupture statements (BreakStatement and ContinueStatement) in order to prepare them for structural transformation.
FlowAnnotator(CompilationUnit) - Constructor for class org.plugin.refactor.code.FlowAnnotator
Creates a new flow annotator and collects existing variable and parameter names from the compilation unit to prevent name collisions when generating auxiliary flags.
ForEachMarkerVisitor - Class in org.plugin.refactor.code
AST visitor that identifies EnhancedForStatement nodes containing non-labeled BreakStatement or ContinueStatement instructions that require transformation.
ForEachMarkerVisitor() - Constructor for class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForEachMarkerVisitor
Creates a new visitor with an empty set of marked enhanced for statements.
ForEachToWhileVisitor - Class in org.plugin.refactor.code
AST visitor responsible for transforming marked EnhancedForStatement nodes into semantically equivalent WhileStatement structures.
ForEachToWhileVisitor(Set<EnhancedForStatement>, ASTRewrite, CompilationUnit) - Constructor for class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForEachToWhileVisitor
Creates a new visitor that converts marked enhanced-for statements using the provided rewrite context.
ForMarkerVisitor - Class in org.plugin.refactor.code
AST visitor that identifies ForStatement nodes containing non-labeled BreakStatement or ContinueStatement instructions that require transformation.
ForMarkerVisitor() - Constructor for class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForMarkerVisitor
Creates a new visitor with an empty set of marked for statements.
ForToWhileVisitor - Class in org.plugin.refactor.code
AST visitor responsible for transforming ForStatement nodes previously marked for modification into semantically equivalent WhileStatement structures.
ForToWhileVisitor(ASTRewrite) - Constructor for class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForToWhileVisitor
Creates a new visitor that performs for-to-while transformations using the provided ASTRewrite.
